title: Publisher Confirms, Windows, and Ambiguity · Go Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release board compares near-miss Go and RabbitMQ decisions for publisher confirms, windows, and ambiguity and accepts only bounded ownership, causal evidence, and an explicit live-broker transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a bounded Go confirm-window ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state.
Bound unconfirmed count, bytes, and age while preserving throughput, memory, fairness, and per-message outcome evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Explain when confirms occur for unroutable messages, persistent classic queues, quorum queues, and multiple routed queues; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Publisher Ledger Cleanup
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go messaging team handles case 4710 during Go publisher supervisor losing one state notification. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retire confirmed sequence entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove no ledger or goroutine leak across generations.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Retire confirmed sequence entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove no ledger or goroutine leak across generations.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Publisher Ledger Cleanup, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Publisher Ledger Cleanup precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Publisher Ledger Cleanup, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A quiz Go messaging team handles case 8139 during stream-versus-queue architecture board. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retire confirmed sequence entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove no ledger or goroutine leak across generations.

For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Publisher Ledger Cleanup, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Automatic connection recovery reconstructs the application confirm ledger and resolves every previous publication.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using retire and confirmed plus specific case evidence.
